notes: Verified: 20/25/30/35/40% schedule, $11700 cap (eff. 2025-09-01), low-income schedule below $1000/mo. Percentage-based model — a handful of constants covers the full income range, no schedule-table data gap.

Verified: 17/25/29/31/35% of combined income, $193k/yr cap (eff. 2026-03-01), $21546/yr self-support reserve. Percentage-of-combined-income model (schedule_type=percentage) — same full-range coverage advantage as Texas, no sparse-table problem.
HB 25-1159 overhaul (eff. 2026-03-01), graduated overnight-credit engine now built and tested. Only 4 of ~800 schedule-table rows verified. DO NOT SHIP without full table.
